name: black-lion-studios
description: Black Lion Studios service request website with user profiles and SQLite storage.

scripts.deploy:static-fast: npm run build && npm run static:prepare && npx firebase-tools deploy --config firebase.static.json --only hosting --project black-lion-media-studio --account blacklionmediastudio@gmail.com
scripts.deploy:framework-hosting: npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting --project black-lion-media-studio --account blacklionmediastudio@gmail.com
scripts.deploy:rules: npx firebase-tools deploy --only firestore:rules,firestore:indexes --project black-lion-media-studio --account blacklionmediastudio@gmail.com
